targets.query: from(bucket: "smartgrid") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "V_Grid_TotalPower") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)

from(bucket: "smartgrid") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "V_Grid_AvgFrequency") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
